title: quercus changhualingensis
intro: Quercus changhualingensis, also known as Changhualing oak, is a rare species of deciduous tree belonging to the Quercus genus. It is found primarily in China and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The bark, leaves, and roots of the plant are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. Herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, are made from the plant's parts to promote recovery and prevent illness.
